case_title: BROWN JAN & ASSOCIATES VS SELBY MANTON 11,ESQ.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SELBY MANTON 11,ESQ.
